componentDescription: A searchable command palette for quickly finding and executing actions or navigating.

open.description: Determines whether the Command component dropdown is currently open.

onOpenChange.description: Callback function triggered when the open state of the Command component changes.

groups.description: Optional array of command groups to display within the component.

commands.description: Optional array of individual command items to display.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text for the command input field.

size.description: Specifies the visual size of the Command component.

variant.description: Defines the visual variant or style of the Command component.

filter.description: Custom filter function to apply to command items based on the input value.

emptyState.description: Content to display when there are no command results.

footer.description: Content to display at the bottom of the Command component, typically for actions or information.

views.description: Customizable styling options for various parts of the Command component.
